reviews.title: They constantly fail
reviews.text:
The sound is good but they constantly fail to connect with my windows 10 laptop. When they do connect, it is usually just one of the earbuds and then it disconnects a short time later. I guess the battery life is okay but I've never been able to run them down as I get so frustrated with the connectivity issues.
The final straw was when I took them out for a jog for the fist time. One earbud failed and now will not power on. Is it due to moisture? I'll never know & I don't care. These are going in the trash.

This appears to use analog out over Lighting rather than having a DAC in the cable. Evidence is that there is volume control similar to using headphones rather than the no volume when plugged into an audio interface. Also if you touch the connector while plugged into speakers you get the sort of popping and cracking found when messing with a headphone cable.

So in summary, it just works.

reviews.title: Comfort!
reviews.text: So the sound quality is good, battery life is good but for me the most important point is they are comfortable. I've been through a LOT of ear buds in search of something that I can wear for several hours without my ears starting to hurt and these are them! Charging case doesn't feel very substantial, but since I don't need to charge them every couple of hours I can live with it.

reviews.title: Interesting app
reviews.text: I've been using these earbuds for several weeks now, and they're as good as any pair I have. And I have several. They connect without issue and have good, clear sound. If you're looking for the intricasies of fine tuning, how good is the base and all that, I'm not the gal for you. However, I think music sounds great, and they're perfect for listening to YouTube vids on my computer and audio books on my phone. The app is interesting. At first I thought I could talk directly to my buds. "Hey, Skullcandy!" (First earbuds I've had with voice control.) But you have to use the app for that feature. Not quite as convenient in my opinion, although perhaps I was expecting too much. The controls are not touch, but require clicking on the individual buds to control them. You can also control them through the app, though. Instructions are clear and easy to understand. I was up and running in minutes. All in all, I think they are excellent and definitely worth the price tag.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text:
First I like sound! I'm an audiophile at heart but in my life now I'm an audiophile on a BUDGET! These are my first bluetooth speakers. More on that in a minute.

I was looking for on ear bluetooth speakers with a budget of about $50 to $60 and was set on waiting for a sale on the JBL EB45T but then saw these recommended on the wirecutter website (a pretty good review site in my opinion)

There is nothing wrong with these, but nothing really right about them either. They have a nice neutral sound that you can listen to for a long time. For movies and youtube on my computer, they are great. But there is nothing in the sound that is going to wow you either. Trust me if there was something actually wrong with the sound, I'd be telling you. You can listen to these for a long time without ear fatigue. If you are looking for lots of rumble for movies, these probably aren't the right phones for you. But if your movie listening requirements are more modest then these work well for that. For casual background music, podcasts, audiobooks, they will work really well for that.

Isolation is not great. I think the plastic is thin so a certain amount of noise gets in. I wanted to be able to hear a little bit of background noise, things going on in the house, but these push my limit for how much I want to hear. Even though they were open-back my Sennheiser HD-229 did a better job with isolation because of the design of the pad.

Comfort isn't bad and for my ears, the ear cup size is just about right size. I wish the earpieces swiveled a bit more but for my head, they swivel just enough. . They have a left and right and the cups swivel so little that if you have them on the wrong way you will notice.

Bluetooth... These are a pain in the backside on Win 7. When I want to use them I have to go and delete the previous pairing, pair them again and then go to the control panel and set these to be used for output. For movies on the computer, they get out of sync. I even set my movie player (Pot Player which I highly recommend) to use the Bluetooth headphones and they still get out of sync with the audio. I don't know if it's the player, the USB Bluetooth adapter, Windows 7 or some combination of them together.

I like that they can be used with a wire as well as with bluetooth. The controls are a little small, as mentioned by others but I don't have trouble working them.

I also tried the JBL EB45T Bluetooth headphones, which cost almost twice as much, at Target and these sound better overall. The JBL might have had better highs, a little punchier bass but these are more cohesive across the frequency range with nothing tweaked to make them sound 'better'.

Summary: I don't have any other Bluetooth headphones to compare these to but I think most people would be very satisfied with these at this price point for general use. If however, you are looking for audiophile on a budget, it's not here.

reviews.title: The sound quality is fantastic and the battery life is excellent
reviews.text: I've been very impressed by many things in the month that I've had this.  The sound quality is fantastic and the battery life is excellent.  I've owned these for a month and the leather cover over the ear cushion is splitting exposing the foam.  Not sure if this is a fluke or what kind of flaw this is.  I've just been using them at my desk and walking around town, medium use for about 5 weeks, when I noticed it was splitting.

reviews.title: Good sound effects
reviews.text: Good sound effects, but Bluetooth connection is not very reliable, the sound is intermittent, you have to turn it off and repair it with other devices like laptop, iPhone, egg.

reviews.title: These headphones are incredible.
reviews.text: Fantastic value. Amazing sound, light and comfortable. I never write reviews but I was so pleased with this product that I did.

reviews.title: Meh... just OK.  Not worth $100
reviews.text: Read some good reviews and picked it up on sale during prime sale.  To me, these are just OK.  I'm not overly impressed.  For $100 they are not worth it, less than $60, just OK.  I have a pair of motorola solo wireless and those are much better as it pertains to battery life, sound, and durability.  These seem like they are going to break very easily.  They feel extremely cheap.  The sound is not bad but nothing overly impressive.  Battery life is meh, it's giving low battery warnings at 50% levels based on what is reported to my iPhone, Plays that warning message about every 5 minutes or so... stupid.  When I turn it on it takes a bit for it to function with my iPhone 7, Motorola solo pretty much instantly ready.  On a positive note, I've used them with phone calls and no one complains... my Motorola solo there are a few times where people had issues hearing me.

reviews.title: Amazing ear pad replacements for the Logitech G35 headset!
reviews.text:
- Makes my G35 headset look better than when I bought it new thanks to the red accent markings!
- The installation tool was extremely helpful, and thanks for including it.
- Just a bit of warning for others the kit that includes the head pad isn’t mean for the Logitech G35 headset, because it is a different size and it doesn’t have Velcro underneath the head pad. I just ordered the ear pads only, and ended up using the spare two fake leather head pads that came with my G35 headset.
- Other thoughts: Not sure what some people are complaining about, but my ear pads are comfortable and fit my headset well. I’m just going to assume some peoples ears are extremely sensitive than others to certain fabrics. I like the cloth mesh pads compared to the original leather pads for two reasons. The cloth won’t crack or peel off like the leather pads, and the cloth pads are more breathable for the ears (ears won’t get hot or humid).

reviews.title: They are comfortable, which is the main thing
reviews.text: I bought these for my G930 since the outside was flaking off of mine a lot. I have been using these for almost 5 months and I have had no issues out of them. They are comfortable, which is the main thing. And since it isn't the fake leather of the original, I dont have a problem with it causing my ears to sweat or stick to it. Installing them were simple as well.

reviews.title: Barely noticeable difference between these pads and the official Logitech pads
reviews.text: The only difference in these pads is that the mesh is slightly rougher than that of the ear pads that come with the Logitech G430 headphones. Otherwise, there is no noticeable difference.

reviews.title: great replacement for my G930
reviews.text: I bought these blue mesh ear pads to replace my original fake leather pads on my Logitech G930 headphones. These went on super easily, took no effort, and are a perfect fit. They also come with a little tool to help slide the pads on but i didn't even need it. I also like the mesh pads because my ears stay a bit cooler than on the original leather-ish ones. These are a great value for the price, and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Good but scratchy.
reviews.text: They fit perfectly on my Logitech g35s but they are very scratchy.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Very nice! Comes with a pen as well!!

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

reviews.title: Even more in love with Elago products now
reviews.text:
OMG! The finish on this case is so soft I can't stop touching it! ... Good touch, not bad touch.
I've been super impressed with everything I've bought from Elago since I discovered them and they are my go-to brand for phone cases. I saw this Airpod case listed for a very reasonable price and being Elago I didn't really think twice when selecting it. I was not disappointed!
Great fit and manufacture. And the finish on the silicone is easily the softest and most even I've even seen/felt. It's so soft. I find myself mindlessly picking it up while sitting at my computer and running my fingers over the surface turning it in my hand because it feels so nice. Elago knocked it out of the park again.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. Applicable to the following earplugs: SE series:  SE110/SE112/SE115/SE210/SE215/SE310/SE315/SE420/SE425/SE530/SE535/SE846 E3C/E4C/E5C/E3G/E4G/E500/i3C/i4C/ SC series: SCL3/SCL4/SCL5/
features: 6 Pairs of replacement tips fit on 3mm cavity tube diameter for balanced armatured in-ear monitor.Please measure the outer diameter of your earplug cavity tube before purchasing, and refer to the picture to obtain the appropriate model.
The only earbud tips that adopt separate packaging; each pair is individually packed in its own little baggie; convenient for storage.
Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
Before wearing, you may need to squeeze the ear tips and put them in your ear and they expand to fit. These are pretty stretchy and stay in place.

reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.title: Hold really well
reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

reviews.title: The quanity you get for the price + the quality is excellent
reviews.text: I like the comfort, quality, and price of these replacement earbuds.  The foam holds up well to use, they never fall off, and they do block out sound around you but not so much you can't hear that someone spoke to you.  The price and quantity is the best on Amazon

reviews.title: Not so great
reviews.text: I bought these as an inexpensive replacement for my ear buds. They took quite a bit of twisting and pushing to get into my ear without feeling like they would fall out. With that, after just a couple days, the outer section broke away from the inner so they no longer fit on the ear bud. I do not recommend purchasing.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement size
reviews.text: Very comfortable, noise isolating, fits my older Phillips SHR 9850 earbuds like new. Like the color because you can tell when they are dirty & need to be replaced.

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

title: PALOVUE Wireless Earbuds, in-Ear Earphones with Bluetooth 5.3, Built-in Mic, 35H Playtime Deep Bass Stereo, with Lightweight Compact Charging Case for Sport/Work Compatible iPhone Android
features: 【Reliable Bluetooth 5.3】PALOVUE wireless earbuds with cutting-edge Bluetooth 5.3 innovation provide instant and steady transmission, providing you with a continuous calling and music experience as well as noise cancellation.
【Automatic Pairing】When removed from the charging case, the wireless headphones would be moment-matched and auto-reconnect with the last-matched device.

【Ergonomic Lightweight Design】The ergonomic in-ear design of the headphones fits in each ear and comes with four different types of silicone ear tips to accommodate every ear profile for a pleasant wearing experience. They weigh 4g apiece and can be worn effectively without pressure, while the charging case weighs 28g and can easily fit in your pocket and be hefted around, making it ideal for commuting, working out, and travelling, among other things.

【Clear HD Sound】The Bluetooth codec supports AAC/SBC and is designed with premium speakers, providing you powerful highs and profound bass and allowing you to enjoy superb music. They include two built-in microphones for clear and raucous calls, making them suitable for any scenario, such as webinars and online classes.

【Waterproof Smart Control】Equipped with IPX5 waterproof grade protects the headphones from perspiration during workout. Ideal for cycling, jogging, exercise, skiing, touring, trekking, and other outdoor activities. Also enables dual-ear easy touch volume/music/call/voice assistant control, among other things, and can switch between single and binaural modes at will. Reliable product quality combined with powerful technology and 2-years after-sales service.

reviews.title: They bump!
reviews.text: These are amazing! For the price, they bump, and now canceling for sure! Nice small size not bulky case. Many sizes to fit many people included. I love them already! Functionality of tapping seems really good also. I was able to move them in my ear without interruption of accidental tap. Very pleased.

title: PHILIPS UpBeat SHE2405 in-Ear Headphones, in-line Mic - White, One Size (SHE2405WT/00)
description: With Philips upbeat headphones, show your colors and match your style! In-ear are designed to fit ear geometry for super comfort with natural fit. A modern earphones design with translucent Housing for dual layer effect. A choice of 4 vibrant colors. 8. 6mm speaker drivers deliver clear sound and rich bass neodymium magnets enhance bass performance oval tube to fit ear geometry for comfort 3 interchangeable rubber ear caps offer an optimal fit Built-in mic switches from music to phone calls

Oval tube design to fit ear geometry for comfort
3 interchangeable rubber ear caps offer an optimal fit
Built-in mic switches from music to phone calls
connectivity_technology: Wired

reviews.title: Hurts your ears after prolonged use
reviews.text: Hurts your ears after prolonged use, and it's difficult to get the earbud in the right position to where it's almost comfortable.

reviews.title: Good quality for cheap earbuds
reviews.text: I have one of those kids who doesn’t notice their earbuds are trailing on the ground behind them. These sounds good, hold up pretty well to the abuse, and are cheap enough to replace when they do break.

title: Coffea Protective Silicone Case with Keychain for Apple AirPods 2 (Black)
features: Made of durable 3mm lightweight, flexible silicone; Shock resistant; Features anti-slip grip.
Compatible with all Qi standard wireless charging pads; No need to remove the case while wireless charging. ONLY for AirPods 1/2 charging case, NOT FOR AIRPODS PRO.
Equipped with a metal carabiner clip; Convenient to attach to a handbag or a backpack.
Precise cutout for lighting port with dust cap keeps the charging port clean when not in use.
0.3mm see-through thin wall allows you to check the LED indicator status any time. AirPods Silicone Case ONLY, AirPods and Charging Case NOT Included.

reviews.title: Good purchase!
reviews.text: This case is perfect.  My AirPods no longer slide off the table.  The case fits perfectly.  I wish I had bought this sooner.  I bought the pink one but I need to buy a brighter one so I can see it in my purse.  Would highly recommend.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: The white and round appearance feels very good, and the earphones are very stable, and they can't be shaken off. You can directly cut the song and adjust the volume, touch the percussion, the sensitivity is OK, and basically it will not be touched by mistake. The earphones are louder and have a certain noise reduction effect when used outside.

title: Acuvar Wired Ear Bud Headphones with Passive Noise Cancelling, in-line Microphone and Play/Pause Button (Silver)
description:
Acuvar in-ear wired Headphones
-The Acuvar in-ear wired Headphones have passive noise cancelling using the sealing power of silicone with its comfortable Silicone ear tips you'll get great comfort and silence any outside noise giving you a greater listening experience and powerfull Deep Bass performance-It features a Serrated flat 3.75 Feet cable, you will never have to worry about untangling your cables before enjoying your music.-Make hands free calls with the in-line microphone and play/pause, Answer/Hang Up button.-You can listen to any type of media from thousands of devices including all Apple iOS, Android and Microsoft Smartphones *(some newer devices need adapters, adapters not included)
features: Enjoy listening to music in style and comfort with in-ear silicone eartips
No setup required, plays your tunes straight out of the box
12mm Driver Units deliver great bass boosted audio
Play music, video, podcast and any media from iOS, Android, Laptop, computers and many more devices
Includes Fuzz and Tangle Free flat serrated 3.75 Ft cord with 3.5mm plated plug. (some newer devices need adapters, adapters not included)

reviews.title: Nice Bass(Y) Ear Buds
